entries.label: Version 1
entries.prompt:
Recreate the same solutions template page layout used for "Crypto Commerce":
1. Hero card (rounded, soft accent-tinted background): back link "← Back to solutions", small uppercase eyebrow label, large bold H1 headline, one-paragraph subtext.
2. "The Risk" section (two columns, light grey background): left has label "THE RISK", a large bold stat, and a short paragraph; right has a rounded accent-tinted callout card with a short bold centered uppercase phrase.
3. "Key benefits" section (white background): H2 "Key benefits", grid of rounded light-grey cards (2 per row), each with a bold title and short description.
4. Closing CTA section (light grey background): centered H2 question with a solid accent-colored button beneath.
5. Footer: centered copyright line.

Content to use:
- Eyebrow label: WEB3 MARKETPLACE TRANSACTIONS
- H1: Protect marketplace transactions before ownership changes.
- Subtext: Wallet Nation enables Web3 marketplaces to link asset and payment so neither party completes the transaction without the other performing, without taking custody of either side.
- Risk label: THE RISK
- Risk stat: Asset ≠ Payment
- Risk paragraph: In many Web3 marketplace transactions, asset transfer and payment aren't linked — exposing one party to non-performance. Wallet Nation ties both together conditionally, before ownership changes.
- Callout box text: LINKED PERFORMANCE
- Key benefit 1 — Linked performance: Asset and payment are linked conditionally, so neither party completes the transaction without the other performing.
- Key benefit 2 — Marketplace-native: Designed to integrate into existing Web3 marketplace flows without requiring new wallets or custody.
- Key benefit 3 — Dispute-ready: If a dispute arises, an agreed arbitrator can review evidence and help resolve it — without unilateral control of the assets.
- CTA headline: Ready to protect your marketplace transact
